calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-14-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-29-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Amy Sommer Anderson, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, JONAH HILLMAN.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) HASAN HASANZADA, aka HASAN SAYED HASANZADA, aka MIKE HASSAN.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Counsel for Plaintiff in open court withdrew her claim for Lost Profits.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $28,200.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: to be recalculated
Attorney's Fees: $3,190.75
Costs: $945.00
Court ordered counsel for Plaintiff to prepare a Judgment and submitted to the court for signature.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
